problem id: b91855fd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  00000101 -> 00101000
  10100010 -> 00010001
  11111111 -> 11111001
  11111011 -> 11011001
  11110100 -> 10100001
  11011011 -> 11011001
  11010011 -> 10011001
  10100101 -> 00101001
  11110011 -> 10011001
  01100011 -> 00011000

query: 00100110
predicted answer: 00110000
